name: The Influencer Intern
effect: Deploy unpaid enthusiasm as a content distribution channel. This card is considered agile.

clauses.name: AUTHENTICITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the content is unscripted: It is considered a genuine brand moment.

clauses.name: GRADUATION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: When the internship ends: All accumulated audience equity is considered an enterprise asset.

clauses.name: VIRAL PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If engagement metrics exceed expectations: Credit is reassigned upward.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Did anyone tell her about the IP clause?
